title: TurboQuant: Redefining AI Efficiency with Extreme Compression (Google Research)
author: Google Research
snippet: Google Research published TurboQuant (ICLR 2026), a two-stage vector compression achieving 3-bit KV cache quantization with ZERO accuracy loss. PolarQuant converts vectors to polar coordinates; QJL adds 1-bit error correction. Results: 6x KV memory reduction, 8x throughput on H100s. No open-source release yet. PROJECT APPLICABILITY: AutoResearch (KVQuant near-term), MarketSwarm (regime fingerprints), QuantMarketData (belief compression), SportsBettingSwarm (polar normalization), FORGE (context compression).
